---
title: ZINC Database
alias: &ALIAS zinc
href: https://zinc.docking.org/
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  include:
    categories: *ALIAS
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

---

## Overview

ZINC is a free database of commercially available compounds for virtual screening, containing over 750 million purchasable compounds in ready-to-dock 3D formats.

## Key Features

- Provides 3D conformer-ready compound files for direct input into molecular docking workflows
- Curates commercially available compounds with vendor and purchasing information
- Supports subset filtering by lead-likeness, drug-likeness, and fragment properties
- Includes annotated libraries of natural products, FDA-approved drugs, and antimicrobials
- Enables tranching and bulk download of compound libraries by property ranges

## Use Cases in Research

- Performing virtual screening campaigns against bacterial or fungal drug targets
- Identifying purchasable hit compounds for experimental validation in AMR drug discovery
- Generating compound libraries for AI-based de novo drug design and scoring model training
- Filtering antibiotic-like scaffolds from large chemical libraries for focused screening
- Docking fragment libraries against novel resistance protein structures for lead identification

## Getting Started

Visit [ZINC Database](https://zinc.docking.org/) to access the database.

## Related Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
